zh.Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: 法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aélis de Porhoët於1185年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林時，她的父親Eudes de Porhoët III37歲，母親Marguerite de Fougères15歲。她於1190年之前與Guy V de Mauvoisin在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1235年享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aélis de Porhoët于1185年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林时，她的父亲Eudes de Porhoët III37岁，母亲Marguerite de Fougères15岁。她于1190年之前与Guy V de Mauvoisin在法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1235年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aélis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alice
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Aélis de Porhoët was born in 1185, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France, her father, Eudes de Porhoët III, was 37 and her mother, Marguerite de Fougères, was 15. She married Guy V de Mauvoisin before 1190, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1235, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aélis de Porhoët est née en 1185, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Eudes de Porhoët III, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Fougères, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Guy V de Mauvoisin avant 1190, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1235, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aélis de Porhoët 1185 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes de Porhoët III 37 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Fougères 15. Sie hat vor 1190 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich Guy V de Mauvoisin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1235 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aélis de Porhoët è nata il nel 1185 nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Eudes de Porhoët III, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Fougères, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Guy V de Mauvoisin prima del 1190, nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1235, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aélis de Porhoëtが1185年にフランスブレタグンモービハンジョセリンで生まれた時，父Eudes de Porhoët IIIは37歳，母Marguerite de Fougèresは15歳であった。1190年以前にフランスブレタグンモービハンジョセリンでGuy V de Mauvoisinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1235年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aélis de Porhoët(이)가 1185년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes de Porhoët III(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Fougères(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1190년 이전 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 Guy V de Mauvoisin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1235년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1205: de 8 de janeiro de 1205 a 7 de janeiro de 1206
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aélis de Porhoët nasceu em 1185, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Eudes de Porhoët III, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Fougères, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy V de Mauvoisin antes 1190, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1235, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aélis de Porhoët родилась в 1185 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Eudes de Porhoët III было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Fougères, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy V de Mauvoisin перед 1190 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1235 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

sm.1205: mai le 8 Ianuari 1205 e o'o I le 7 Ianuari 1206

es.1205: desde 8 de enero de 1205 hasta 7 de enero de 1206
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aélis de Porhoët nació en 1185, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Eudes de Porhoët III, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Fougères, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Guy V de Mauvoisin antes de 1190, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1235, a la edad de 50 años.
